deepDives.title: ASK IT Platform
deepDives.activationTiming: Launch Feb 2026, aligned with Frontier Firm motion and scaled execution in H2 FY26
deepDives.revenueOutlook: Est. $300K per year ongoing ACR. MCI-eligible, 3:1 pro/post-sales ratio met. 4 total pipelines, 3 signed (Chervon, ICA, ETS total 140K), 1 awaiting (est 30K ACR).
deepDives.summary: ASK IT is a modular, enterprise-grade IT Support Copilot platform designed to modernize and scale enterprise IT service operations using Microsoft Cloud & AI. Employees interact with IT systems through natural language while preserving enterprise security, governance, and compliance. Built as a platform — not a point tool — it unifies intelligent Q&A, enterprise knowledge search, secure execution of IT workflows, and native embedding within Microsoft Teams, all within the Microsoft trust boundary.

phases.title: Pioneer Innovation
phases.body: Focused on shaping the right product direction, not selling AI features. Led technical workshops and architecture deep dives to align Insight roadmap with CAIP strategy. Established ASK IT as an enterprise IT platform with clear security, governance, and enterprise-readiness boundaries, positioning Microsoft Teams as the primary user entry point.

phases.title: Commit to Build
phases.body: Qualified scalable IT support scenarios suitable for automation. Conducted architecture reviews aligned with enterprise security and governance, designed modular repeatable components, and ensured integration patterns respect identity, permissions, and compliance — transforming ASK IT from concept into a production-ready enterprise solution.

phases.title: Build to Consume
phases.body: Turned the solution into a repeatable, consumption-driven offer. Enabled consistent multi-customer delivery, embedded ASK IT into Microsoft Teams to reduce adoption friction, ensured extensibility via standardized integrations, and positioned the offer for Marketplace and Joint GTM execution at scale.

deepDives.title: DB Insight Platform
deepDives.activationTiming: Launch Feb 2026, aligned with Frontier Firm motion and scaled execution in H2 FY26
deepDives.revenueOutlook: Est. $250K annual ongoing ACR. MCI-eligible, 3:1 pro/post-sales ratio met. 3 signed deals (Hayco 76K, YFY Jupiter 58K, Artiso Education 44K, total 178K annual).
deepDives.summary: DB Insight is a modular, enterprise-grade AI analytics and decision platform that bridges structured enterprise data with generative AI and autonomous agents. A DB Semantic AI layer transforms raw enterprise data into governed, semantically enriched, AI-consumable knowledge. Unlike traditional BI dashboards or isolated RAG chatbots, DB Insight converts business questions directly into trusted insights and live dashboards with full control over cost, security, governance, and usage.

phases.title: Pioneer Innovation
phases.body: Shaped Superhub's technical and product direction (not SKUs). Led technical workshops and architecture deep dives to align their roadmap with CAIP strategy. Positioned Copilot, Azure OpenAI, and CAIP as the foundation for decision intelligence; helped identify Build-to-Consume scenarios with clear business ownership; ran hands-on enablement to raise architect intensity.

phases.title: Commit to Build
phases.body: Drove disciplined execution: qualified real scenarios, filtered non-scalable use cases, ran architecture reviews aligned to Microsoft well-architected and AI governance frameworks. Structured the build plan including PoC scope, partner skilling, and Marketplace/GTM readiness checkpoints. Used PoC as validation gates, not demos.

phases.title: Build to Consume
phases.body: Guided Superhub through MVP build support, offer validation, and commercial readiness. Supported Marketplace IP-offer positioning and service commercialization aligned to Microsoft GTM motions. Enabled consistent multi-customer delivery, removed adoption blockers early, and measured success through new customer wins, expansion signals, and usage growth.

deepDives.title: GitHub Copilot 1-Day Hands-On Workshop
deepDives.activationTiming: Launch Apr 2026, aligned with Frontier Distributor motion and scaled execution in H2 FY26
deepDives.revenueOutlook: Est. $100K USD per year ongoing ACR. MCI-eligible, 3:1 pro/post-sales ratio met. 4 signed deals (上海凯世通 35× GitHub Enterprise + 35× Copilot Business, 西域智慧供应链 65 seats, 上海它石智航 100 seats, 上海英恒 10 seats).
deepDives.summary: An executive-ready, outcome-focused enablement offer that moves teams from awareness to practical adoption in a single day. Led by PSAs, the workshop combines concise positioning with immersive hands-on labs so developers and technical leaders can apply Copilot in real coding scenarios — accelerating code writing, refactoring, and debugging while addressing responsible usage, governance, and integration with GitHub and CI/CD pipelines.

phases.title: Pioneer Innovation
phases.body: Took primary ownership of early-stage enablement and strategic alignment. Led structured workshops, hands-on technical training, and solution-vision sessions to build partner capability and confidence beyond product knowledge — focusing on real customer pain points, industry scenarios, and repeatable solution patterns.

phases.title: Commit to Build
phases.body: Hands-on co-building and risk-reduction with partner engineering, delivery, and pre-sales. Provided architectural guidance, reference designs, and design reviews; supported PoV and lighthouse pilots to validate performance, security, scalability, and operational readiness. Refined service scope, pricing, and delivery models to make the offer repeatable, scalable, and supportable.

phases.title: Build to Consume
phases.body: Shifted to GTM activation and revenue acceleration. Supported joint campaigns, customer workshops, sales-play development, and pipeline shaping; aligned messaging to customer outcomes and connected technical value to business impact — turning the co-built solution into a scalable revenue engine.

deepDives.title: Azure Migration Service: 3-week implementation
deepDives.activationTiming: Launch May 2026, aligned with Frontier Firm motion and scaled execution in H2 FY26
deepDives.revenueOutlook: GIFI Asian Limited $120K · Hong Kong Metropolitan University OBSA $135K · AstroX Labs Limited $960K · Est. $1.5M per year ongoing ACR.
deepDives.summary: An executive-ready, outcome-driven offer that helps partners and customers rapidly transition from assessment to production-ready Azure deployment. Combines structured guidance with hands-on delivery to ensure a secure, compliant, scalable Azure foundation — validated landing zones, prioritized workload migrations, governance, cost management, and operational readiness aligned with the Microsoft Cloud Adoption Framework.

phases.title: Pioneer Innovation
phases.body: Led structured discovery and readiness assessments to evaluate environments, identify migration candidates, and define a prioritized roadmap aligned with business objectives. Focused on real customer constraints — compliance, data residency, operational dependencies — and shaped clear value propositions, quick-win workloads, and migration approaches that are technically feasible and commercially viable.

phases.title: Commit to Build
phases.body: Drove hands-on co-building and execution to accelerate delivery and reduce risk. Provided deep architectural guidance, landing-zone implementation support, and migration best practices: identity, networking, security, governance, monitoring. Supported workload migration execution, validation, and optimization for performance, resilience, and compliance — making the offer repeatable, scalable, and supportable.

phases.title: Build to Consume
phases.body: Shifted to solution activation and revenue acceleration. Supported partners through joint customer engagements, solution workshops, and sales enablement so teams could position and scale the offer. Connected migration value to cost optimization, agility, and AI readiness; built pipeline, reference scenarios, and customer success stories to drive sustained Azure consumption.

deepDives.title: KnowledgeWiz — Internal RAG bot Agent
deepDives.activationTiming: Launch Apr 2026, aligned with Frontier Firm motion and scaled execution in H2 FY26
deepDives.revenueOutlook: 3 signed customers · HSH 40K USD/yr · Building King 40K USD/yr · VG 40K USD/yr · Est. $360K USD per year ongoing ACR.
deepDives.summary: An enterprise-ready, outcome-driven solution that transforms internal knowledge into a secure, actionable, always-available AI assistant. Built on Azure OpenAI, Azure AI Search, and enterprise-grade governance architecture — combining advanced retrieval, policy-aware access control, and agent-based execution to deliver accurate, citation-backed responses and actionable outcomes while ensuring data security, compliance, and measurable impact.

phases.title: Pioneer Innovation
phases.body: Led structured discovery and knowledge-readiness assessments with Eastech to evaluate existing repositories, identify high-value use cases, and define a prioritized roadmap. Focused on document ecosystems (SOPs, policies, manuals, compliance) and assessed retrieval gaps, accuracy, and trust — shaping value propositions that turn internal knowledge into a secure, permission-aware AI assistant.

phases.title: Commit to Build
phases.body: Drove hands-on co-building of a production-ready RAG system: hybrid search, policy-aware security trimming, grounded answer generation with citation validation, evaluation frameworks, observability pipelines, and guardrails. Designed the agent layer for actionable workflows integrated with enterprise systems (ticketing, automation) — reducing delivery risk and ensuring response accuracy and trust.

phases.title: Build to Consume
phases.body: Shifted to activation, adoption, and scaling. Positioned KnowledgeWiz as business-critical capability across HR support, IT ops, compliance advisory, and customer service. Connected technical capabilities to productivity, reduced operational risk, and faster decision-making; supported continuous optimization via feedback loops, usage analytics, and model tuning.

site.title: Work Summary Dashboard
site.footer: © 2026 Microsoft Work Summary • Built for quarterly and annual review

overview.title: From Solution Build to Market Win to Business Scale
overview.description: What I have built is not a series of short-term wins, but a sustainable partner growth engine for AI and Data. This engine integrates strategic focus, conversion mechanisms, solution standardization, and ecosystem expansion into a cohesive system, validated by measurable pipeline, consumption, and revenue outcomes. Ultimately, my core contribution lies in enabling partners to succeed and, through their success, driving scalable and sustained growth while amplifying Microsoft's value across the ecosystem.

profile.name: Charles DENG
profile.title: Senior Partner Solution Architect at Microsoft
profile.summary: Senior Cloud Solutions Architect with 11+ years transforming global enterprise cloud ecosystems. Pioneer in integrating autonomous AI agents and multi-agent orchestration to unify compliance, security, and operational resilience. Delivers high-performance, low-latency multi-cloud architectures with AI-powered self-optimization, driving measurable cost savings and regulatory readiness at scale.

pmx.title: PMX project detail
pmx.intro: I deliberately shifted my focus from “task execution” to “building systems that continuously amplify outcomes.” This transformation also led me to redefine my role within the partner ecosystem: not merely as a technical supporter, but as a catalyst who enables partners to succeed and, through their success, amplifies Microsoft’s impact. This aligns closely with Microsoft’s core value that success is measured not only by what we achieve individually, but by how effectively we empower others to achieve more. Meanwhile, as a technically focused Partner Solution Architect, I became increasingly convinced that sustainable growth must be grounded in deep technical capabilities and scalable solution design.

pmx.detailNote: Source file: pmx-workbook.html (synced from your PMX export).

solutionBuild.title: Solution Build summary
solutionBuild.intro: I shifted focus from project execution to capability industrialization. I led the development of 13 standardized AI and Data solution plays, each with clearly defined architectures, deployment models, and value propositions, enabling partners to replicate and deliver consistently. To date, 5 solution offers have been activated.

overview.title: 从 Solution Build 到 Market Win 再到 Business Scale
overview.description: 我所构建的不是一系列短期胜利，而是 AI 和数据领域的可持续伙伴成长引擎。这个引擎集成了战略聚焦、转化机制、方案标准化和生态拓展，形成了一个有机整体，并由可衡量的 pipeline、消耗和营收成果验证。最终，我的核心贡献在于使伙伴成功，通过他们的成功驱动可扩展和可持续的增长，同时放大 Microsoft 在整个生态中的价值。

profile.name: Charles DENG
profile.title: 微软高级伙伴解决方案架构师
profile.summary: 资深云解决方案架构师，拥有 11 年以上全球企业云生态转型经验。专注将自主 AI Agent 与多智能体协同编排结合，统一合规、安全与运营韧性。可交付高性能、低时延的多云架构，并通过 AI 自优化实现可量化的降本增效与规模化监管就绪。

pmx.title: PMX 项目详情
pmx.intro: 我有意地将关注点从“任务执行”转向“构建能持续放大成果的系统”。这一转变也促使我在伙伴生态中重新定位自己的角色：不仅是一名技术支持者，更是赋能伙伴成功的催化剂，并通过他们的成功放大微软的影响力。这与微软“我们的成功不仅体现在个人成就，更体现在我们如何高效地帮助他人成就更多”的核心价值观高度一致。同时，作为一名以技术为本的伙伴解决方案架构师，我愈发坚信：可持续的增长必须建立在深厚的技术能力与可扩展的解决方案设计之上。

solutionBuild.title: Solution Build 总结
solutionBuild.viewAllLabel: 查看全部 16 个 Offer 激活 →
solutionBuild.intro: 我把工作重心从项目执行转向能力工业化。我主导构建了 13 个标准化 AI 与数据解决方案 play，每个都具备清晰的架构、部署模型和价值主张，帮助伙伴可复制、可持续交付。目前已有 5 个 solution offer 完成 activation。

site.title: 工作總結看板
site.footer: © 2026 Microsoft 工作總結 • 適用於季度與年度回顧

overview.title: 從 Solution Build 到 Market Win 再到 Business Scale
overview.description: 我所構建的不是一系列短期勝利，而是 AI 和數據領域的可持續夥伴成長引擎。這個引擎集成了戰略聚焦、轉化機制、方案標準化和生態拓展，形成了一個有機整體，並由可衡量的 pipeline、消耗和營收成果驗證。最終，我的核心貢獻在於使夥伴成功，通過他們的成功驅動可擴展和可持續的增長，同時放大 Microsoft 在整個生態中的價值。

profile.name: Charles DENG
profile.title: 微軟高級夥伴解決方案架構師
profile.summary: 資深雲解決方案架構師，擁有 11 年以上全球企業雲生態轉型經驗。專注將自主 AI Agent 與多智能體協同編排整合，統一合規、安全與營運韌性。可交付高效能、低延遲的多雲架構，並透過 AI 自優化實現可量化的成本節省與規模化監管就緒。

items.role: 高級夥伴解決方案架構師

中國香港，中國香港特別行政區

pmx.title: PMX 專案詳情
pmx.intro: 我有意地將關注點從「任務執行」轉向「建構能持續放大成果的系統」。這一轉變也促使我在夥伴生態中重新定位自己的角色：不僅是一名技術支持者，更是賦能夥伴成功的催化劑，並透過他們的成功放大微軟的影響力。這與微軟「我們的成功不僅體現在個人成就，更體現在我們如何高效地幫助他人成就更多」的核心價值觀高度一致。同時，作為一名以技術為本的夥伴解決方案架構師，我愈發堅信：可持續的成長必須建立在深厚的技術能力與可擴展的解決方案設計之上。
pmx.detailTitle: 嵌入式 PMX 工作簿
pmx.detailDescription: 下方 iframe 會直接載入站點根目錄中的 PMX 工作簿檔案。
pmx.detailNote: 來源檔案：pmx-workbook.html（由 PMX 匯出同步）。

solutionBuild.title: Solution Build 總結
solutionBuild.viewAllLabel: 查看全部 16 個 Offer 激活 →
solutionBuild.intro: 我把工作重心從專案執行轉向能力工業化。我主導建立了 13 個標準化 AI 與數據解決方案 play，每個都具備清晰的架構、部署模型與價值主張，讓夥伴可複製且穩定交付。目前已有 5 個 solution offer 完成 activation。
